tools.name: get_city_noise
tools.description: Answers "how loud is Tokyo", "noise level in Mumbai", "is Delhi louder than London". Estimated day/night noise ranges (dB), rank among 50 major world cities, dominant noise sources and a confidence label, with WHO guideline context (53 dB Lden / 45 dB Lnight). Estimates synthesized from published so

tools.name: list_loudest_cities
tools.description: Answers "loudest cities in the world", "noisiest cities ranking", "which city has the worst noise pollution". 50 major world cities ordered by estimated daytime noise, loudest first — estimates synthesized from published sources, not measurements. For "loudest cities in the US" or "quietest cities i

tools.name: lookup_sound_level
tools.description: Answers "how loud is a hair dryer", "how many decibels is a chainsaw", "is 85 decibels loud", "how loud is 80 decibels". Decibel level and hearing-risk guidance for everyday sounds (whisper, conversation, traffic, lawn mower, concert, jet engine...), every figure sourced to CDC/NIOSH/NIDCD/ASHA publ

tools.name: safe_exposure_time
tools.description: Answers "how long can I listen to 100 dB", "is 85 dB dangerous for 8 hours", "how long at a concert before hearing damage". Maximum daily safe exposure time for a sound level per NIOSH's recommended exposure limit: 85 dB(A) for 8 h, 3 dB exchange rate (88 dB → 4 h, 100 dB → 15 min). Input is a dB nu

tools.name: get_us_city_noise_exposure
tools.description: Answers "loudest cities in the US", "quietest cities in the US", "how noisy is Boston", "what share of Miami hears highway noise". Share of residents exposed to ≥60 dB / ≥70 dB transportation noise for all 297 US cities of 100,000+ residents, computed from the federal BTS 2020 National Transportatio

tools.name: get_address_noise
tools.description: Answers "how loud is my neighborhood", "noise map by address", "how noisy is this address". Modeled transportation noise (road + rail + aircraft, 24-hour average LAeq dBA) at a US street address or lat/lng, sampled block-by-block from the federal BTS 2020 National Transportation Noise Map. Returns a

tools.name: get_europe_city_noise
tools.description: Answers "how loud is Paris", "noisiest cities in Europe", "environmental noise in Berlin", "quietest cities in Spain". Measured (not estimated) noise for 314 European cities in 24 EEA-reporting countries, from the EEA Environmental Noise Directive 2022 strategic noise maps; ranked by population-weig

tools.name: get_neighborhood_noise
tools.description: Answers "loudest neighborhoods in Los Angeles", "quietest neighborhood in Chicago", "which NYC neighborhood has the most noise". 384 neighborhoods in Los Angeles, New York and Chicago, ranked within their city by share of residents ≥60 dB transportation noise, computed from the federal BTS 2020 Nati

tools.name: get_noise_ordinance
tools.description: Answers "what are quiet hours in Boston", "<city> noise ordinance", "how do I file a noise complaint". Verbatim-verified summary of the city's official noise ordinance: quiet hours, decibel limits (or their explicit absence — audibility/nuisance standards), complaint channel, code citation + officia

tools.name: get_decibel_shield_app
tools.description: Answers "is there a decibel meter app", "best decibel meter app for iPhone", "how do I measure sound with my iPhone", "what is Decibel Shield". Facts and the App Store link for Decibel Shield - dB Meter, the iOS sound level meter app behind this data: features, pricing, requirements. Use only when s

findings.title: Lethal trifecta: untrusted input + private data + external sink
findings.detail: Server "mcp" exposes tools that together enable an exfiltration flow. Untrusted content: get_noise_ordinance · Private data: get_city_noise, lookup_sound_level, safe_exposure_time, get_us_city_noise_exposure, get_neighborhood_noise, get_noise_ordinance, get_decibel_shield_app · Public sink: get_us_city_noise_exposure, get_neighborhood_noise.

evidence.snippet: Untrusted content: get_noise_ordinance · Private data: get_city_noise, lookup_sound_level, safe_exposure_time, get_us_city_noise_exposure, get_neighborhood_noise, get_noise_ordinance, get_decibel_shield_app · Public sink: get_us_city_noise_exposure, get_neighborhood_noise

findings.remediation: Do not co-install these capabilities under one trust boundary; an injected comment/email can steer the model to exfiltrate via the sink tool.
